title: MOTDChanger
description: A plugin that changes your MOTD either randomly, or set
body:
**_
MOTDChanger: Elevate Your Server's First Impression_**

MOTDChanger transforms the most underutilized aspect of your Minecraft server - the Message of the Day (MOTD) - into a powerful tool for engaging players before they even join. This lightweight yet feature-rich plugin empowers server administrators to create dynamic, colorful, and eye-catching server descriptions that rotate automatically.
Key Features

Rich **Color Support**: Implement the full spectrum of Minecraft color codes and formatting options (bold, italic, underline) to create visually striking MOTDs that capture attention in server lists.

Automatic Rotation: Configure multiple messages that change at customizable intervals, keeping your server description fresh and engaging for returning players.

Server Properties Integration: Seamlessly updates your server.properties file with new MOTDs, ensuring compatibility with all Minecraft clients and server list services.

Random or Sequential Display: Choose between randomly selected messages or orderly rotation to suit your server's style.

Simple Command Interface: Manage all aspects of your MOTDs with intuitive commands:

/motd list - View all configured messages

/motd add <text> - Create new entries on-the-fly

/motd set <index> - Manually select a specific message

/motd remove <index> - Delete unwanted entries

/motd reload - Apply configuration changes instantly


**Permission-Based Access**: Secure command usage with the motdchanger.admin permission, ensuring only authorized staff can modify your server's presentation.
**
Why Choose This Plugin?**

While other MOTD plugins exist, this solution stands apart with its perfect balance of simplicity and power. The lightweight design ensures minimal server impact while the intuitive configuration allows for maximum creativity. Whether you're running a small community server or a large network, this plugin offers the flexibility to maintain a professional and eye-catching presence in server listings.

The server.properties integration ensures maximum compatibility across all platforms, while the color code support allows for vibrant designs that highlight your server's unique personality. With automatic rotation capabilities, you can promote different server features, announce events, or simply keep the description fresh and interesting for returning players.
